main.description: Describe a space, including host-specific configuration. Requires a space credential; implemented by a space host.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.
Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

config.description: Host-specific space configuration. Open union; space-management implementations other than simplespace supply their own config types.
